ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Forward, Defense) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Shooting hand of the player */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is a team captain */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_overall" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's current contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  "team_captain" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "team_coach" INTEGER /* ID of the team's head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_coach FOREIGN KEY ("team_coach") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league's commissioner */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the player played for the team */,
  "team_captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was a captain during the season */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into a shootout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_player_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "game_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of game appearances made by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes served by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Player's plus-minus rating for the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots by the player */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship for the season */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that was the runner-up for the season */,
  "champion_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the champion team for the season */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP player for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_runner_up_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_player_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "game_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of game appearances made by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes served by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Player's plus-minus rating for the season */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots by the player */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "fired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was fired (if applicable) */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Coach's win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_seasons" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "record" TEXT /* Coach's record (e.g., W-L-T) for the season */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances during the season */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Date of the user's last access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
